name: Sticky Toffee Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the butter in a large mixing bowl and add the sugar. Cream together until pale and light.
2. Sift the flour and baking powder onto a plate.
3. Beat the egg with a little flour into the creamed mixture.
4. Continue beating for a few minutes before mixing in the rest of the flour.
5. Lightly flour and finely chop the dates.
6. Put the dates and boiling water into the bowl, then mix in the baking soda and vanilla.
7. Gradually blend this mixture into the batter, mixing well.
8. Transfer to an 11-by-7-inch, lightly greased cake pan and spread evenly.
9. Bake in a 350-degree oven for 40 minutes.
10. To make the toffee sauce, melt the butter in a small saucepan and add the sugar and cream. Simmer gently for 3 minutes.
11. Cut the hot pudding into squares and cover with the sauce.
12. Place under a hot broiler until it bubbles. Serve immediately.
6 to 8 servings
